dict.string: Sofa uses your location to show current weather conditions and forecasts in your planner, helping you better plan your day.

Sofa uses your camera to capture photos for personalizing your collections and adding attachments to itinerary items. For example, you can take a photo to use as a custom cover image for a book or movie, create a hero image for your lists and categories, or attach photos to your travel activities.
Sofa uses your location to show current weather conditions and forecasts in your planner, helping you better plan your day.

Sofa accesses your photo library to let you select existing photos for personalizing your collections and adding attachments to itinerary items. For example, you can choose a photo to use as a custom cover image for a book or movie, select an image to represent your lists and categories, or attach photos to your travel activities.
